# 🧩 DamcoWorks Logo Component Specification

## 📌 Overview
The **DamcoWorks Application Logo** is an inline SVG-based component used in the application header. It is clickable and typically redirects to the home/dashboard.

---

## 🏗️ Component Structure

```
Header Container
└── ApplicationTitle Wrapper (Clickable)
    └── Inline SVG Block
        └── SVG Logo (Vector Paths)
```

---

## 🧱 HTML + SVG Implementation

```html
<div class="header-logo ph">
  <div class="application-name display-flex align-items-center full-height" 
       role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Go to Home">

    <div class="svg-wrapper OSInline application-logo nb-logo" style="height: 100%;">

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## 🎨 Colors

- Black `#000000` — paths 1, 2, 4 (bottom-left dot, top-left dot, left chain link)
- Red `#EB332D` — paths 3, 5, 6 (top-right dot, center chain link, mid-left chain link)

---

## ⚙️ Behavior

- Clickable logo (acts as navigation)
- Keyboard accessible
- Fully scalable SVG

---

## ♿ Accessibility Recommendation

Add:
```html
aria-label="Go to Home"
```

---

## 🚀 Notes

- Keep SVG inline for performance
- Avoid converting to image formats
- Maintain consistent class usage
